## Purpose

Describe the reader, authoring or platform problem this change solves.

## Scope

- [ ] Curriculum or prose
- [ ] Example code or contract
- [ ] Shared template/platform code
- [ ] Dependencies or workflow
- [ ] Documentation only

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes
- [ ] Relevant learner commands were run from the documented working directory
- [ ] Browser, accessibility and performance checks were run when UI behavior changed
- [ ] `validation-report.md` records new evidence and remaining risk
- [ ] No credentials, generated output or unrelated changes are included

## Compatibility

List affected template versions, book versions, routes, examples or migration steps. Write `None` only after checking.
